objective: Provide a complete, non-secret handoff for App Store, Google Play, and domestic store reviewers to access restricted app functionality with a dedicated review account and seeded demo data.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Review
officialBasis.requirement: Provide account information and review instructions in App Review Information when restricted functionality requires a login or special setup.

officialBasis.name: Google Play login credentials for app access
officialBasis.requirement: Restricted apps must provide valid, reusable, always-accessible credentials and instructions so reviewers can access all functionality.

officialBasis.name: Google Play prepare your app for review
officialBasis.requirement: App content and app access instructions must explain privacy policy, restricted areas, permissions, and special reviewer access.

credentialRules: Use a dedicated review account, not a personal admin account.
Keep the account reusable, valid, and accessible regardless of reviewer location.
Disable MFA, OTP, geo-gates, device binding, and expiring passwords for the review account.
Store the real password only in the release password manager or store console fields, never in this repository.
If credentials change, rerun review seeding and cloud smoke before submitting an update.

authenticatedSmokeEvidence.purpose: Record sanitized proof for login, session cookie, CORS, protected APIs, and review-safe data rights paths after the real review account exists.

seededArtifacts.purpose: Safe demo product for selection, prompt, and dry-run video workflow review.
Safe account/persona asset for reviewer path.
Dry-run task evidence without paid real video execution.

successEvidence: Demo product appears in selection/assets data.
Demo account asset appears in account assets.
Dry-run batch is created and visible in the task list.
Data rights request API is accessible to the review account.

reviewerPath.instruction: Open the app and confirm the beginner-friendly Video mode buttons are visible.
reviewerPath.expected: One-click video, Batch generation, Image-to-video, Stitch, Assets, and My data entries are visible.

reviewerPath.instruction: Switch to Image/Text mode and tap Prompt Package.
reviewerPath.expected: Create opens directly on the prompt package step.

reviewerPath.instruction: Review product image, product information, prompt package, and dry-run video generation controls.
reviewerPath.expected: Reviewer can inspect the workflow without real paid video execution.
Mobile cards are visible and desktop tables are hidden on phone widths.
Reviewer can see the mobile stitching workflow and existing task/result cards.

reviewerPath.instruction: Open App readiness, support, privacy, data export, and account deletion entries.
reviewerPath.expected: Reviewer can inspect compliance, support, and data rights flows.

fields: review password or private submission channel

commands: REVIEW_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top REVIEW_USERNAME=<account> REVIEW_PASSWORD=<secret> npm run review:seed
SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top SMOKE_USERNAME=<account> SMOKE_PASSWORD=<secret> npm run cloud:smoke
